description: Scoped to the custom regex manager only, so Renovate never overlaps with Dependabot.
gomod, github-actions and docker base images stay owned by .github/dependabot.yml.
Renovate keeps the pinned scanner versions in the Dockerfile current; the hardcoded
SHA256 sums are regenerated by scripts/update_scanner_checksums.py (see the
scanner-checksums CI check and the postUpgradeTasks hook below).

customManagers.description: Scanner release binaries pinned via ARG <TOOL>_VERSION (GitHub releases)
Scanner tools pinned via ARG <TOOL>_VERSION and installed with pip (PyPI)

postUpgradeTasks.description: Self-hosted only: regenerate the hardcoded SHA256 sums after a binary version bump and include the change in the same commit. Requires the runner to allow this command (allowedCommands). On Mend-hosted Renovate this is skipped; the scanner-checksums CI check enforces the refresh there instead.
